query:
UPDATE platform_config 
SET configValue = (SELECT configValue FROM (SELECT configValue FROM platform_config WHERE configKey = 'STRIPE_TEST_SECRET_KEY') AS t),
    description = 'Active Stripe secret key (currently: test mode)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE configKey = 'STRIPE_SECRET_KEY';

UPDATE platform_config 
SET configValue = (SELECT configValue FROM (SELECT configValue FROM platform_config WHERE configKey = 'STRIPE_TEST_PUBLISHABLE_KEY') AS t),
    description = 'Active Stripe publishable key (currently: test mode)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE configKey = 'STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY';

UPDATE platform_config 
SET configValue = (SELECT configValue FROM (SELECT configValue FROM platform_config WHERE configKey = 'STRIPE_TEST_WEBHOOK_SECRET') AS t),
    description = 'Active Stripe webhook secret (currently: test mode)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE configKey = 'STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET';
